info.name: Store Locator API — Full Test Suite
info.description:
Complete test suite covering all endpoints, edge cases, and RBAC. Examiner-ready.

Setup:
1. Set base_url variable (default: http://localhost:5000)
2. Run '🔐 Auth / Login as Admin' first — tokens auto-saved
3. Run folders in order

Variables managed automatically by Pre-request / Test scripts.

item.name: 🏥 Health Check
item.description: Verify the API is running and database is connected

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: JWT login, refresh, logout, and /me endpoint

request.description: Login as admin. Saves access_token and refresh_token to collection variables.

item.name: Refresh Token — Get New Access Token
🔍 Store Search (Public — No Auth Required)
item.description: Public POST /api/stores/search endpoint with rate limiting

item.name: Create Store — Minimal data (auto-geocode skipped, coords provided)
PATCH Store — Update status to temporarily_closed
📦 CSV Import
item.description: Batch upsert via CSV upload. Use stores_1000.csv for full test.

item.name: Import CSV — 1000 stores (update path before running!)

formdata.description: ⚠️ UPDATE PATH: Set src to your local stores_1000.csv path
⚠️ UPDATE PATH: Set src to your local stores_50.csv path

item.name: 👥 User Management (Admin Only)
item.description: CRUD for users. All endpoints require admin role.

item.name: Update User — Change role to marketer
Update User — Change role back to viewer
